name: button
label: Button
description: A versatile button with multiple variants, sizes, link support, and built-in Livewire loading states.

props.name: type
props.description: Renders a <button> or an <a> when set to 'a'.

props.name: variant
props.description: The visual style of the button.

props.name: loader
props.description: Show a spinner while a wire:click / wire:target is running.
